title: Astro 6 stack is live
summary: Astro 6, Vercel adapter, CSP, and live signal plumbing are now active on AI Snowball.

title: AI Snowball brand refresh
summary: The site now positions itself as an operator-grade AI systems journal rather than a generic productivity blog.

title: Homepage signals now run from Notion
summary: Homepage cards can now be curated in Notion and exported into the runtime signal source used by the site.
